result:
**Goal: Add a DNA Helix & Genetic Algorithm simulation mode.**

This would visualize a rotating 3D ASCII double helix structure paired with a live genetic algorithm — evolving a population of bit-string organisms toward a fitness target, with the helix rendering showing the "best genome" mutating in real-time. It fits naturally as the next addition alongside the existing 70+ modes, combines biological visualization with computational evolution, and hasn't been covered by any existing mode.

Shall I build it?
